title: owainlewis/awesome-artificial-intelligence: a curated AI learning index
friendlyTitle: A large list of useful ways to learn about AI
summary: This long-running curated repository organises AI courses, books, lectures, papers and engineering resources. Recent work adds automated weekly curation while preserving a public archive of the selected material.
friendlySummary: This repository collects AI courses, books, videos, papers and engineering guides in one place.
whyItMatters: Learners and teams can use it to build a reading plan or find references without starting from a blank search page. As with any large resource list, check publication dates, prerequisites and original sources before investing substantial time.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to choose what to learn next, but check that each resource is current and suitable for your level.
